---
name: "Migration Closeout"
description: "Sync the .migrate docs and customization after a meaningful mobile migration planning or implementation slice."
argument-hint: "State what changed and which migration docs or instructions should be refreshed."
---
Close out a mobile migration work slice.

Requirements:

- inspect the current `.migrate` docs and customization files first
- update only the docs and guidance that the completed slice actually affects
- keep `docs/backlog.md` and `docs/open-questions.md` accurate
- summarize what changed, what validation ran, and what the next agent should pick up
